untranslatable_reason: CCI (Commodity Channel Index) is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The signal requires CCI calculation with 20-day lookback period and threshold of -100, but this indicator is not available in the backtest engine's supported set.
translation_notes: Signal references CCI crosses above -100 threshold as buy signal for mean reversion strategy. Source text confirms 20-day lookback period and -100 threshold indicates oversold condition. Exit conditions were not specified (AUTHOR_SILENT) so no reversal condition was inferred. Cannot proceed without CCI indicator support.
